title: undertale soundpack
description: This Sound pack is a texture pack that is used with another mod to replace the boring old minecraft music with undertale osts. so sit back and relax to the most relaxing and nerve racking Undertale songs while you play Minecraft.
body:
This Sound pack is a texture pack that is used with another mod to replace the boring old minecraft music with undertale osts. so sit back and relax to the most relaxing and nerve racking Undertale songs while you play Minecraft.

How to install it click this link which has more information on how to install it: [reactive music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music#download)
